title: Shared calendars need basic features added

posts.author: DanielGrove (Daniel Grove)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I share a calendar it lacks these basic features I would expect:

  1. A label on top for what month is being viewed
  2. Navigation control for changing month/year
  3. The ability to click on an item and view it’s details.

I did find that if you undock the calendar view and make the link the recipient will now be able to navigate month/year and see what month is being viewed.

This seems like a lack of development and design. We pay a lot to use your amazing service and it has so many useful and advanced features but we need to do the basic things too like send a functioning calendar with info to our clients / partners that are not Monday users.

posts.author: AdamCPU (Adam Raphael)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, shared calendar is too basic.
Points 1 and 2 are essential and should be included as standard.
Point 3 would be a good option, but you might not always want it.
